## Changelog

### Changes

- Admin can now hide a profile from the public list of profiles, and only allow it to be used by specific players' pseudos.
  > [!WARNING]
  > Hiding a profile is not a security measure. Players can easily bypass this restriction by modifying the request to the server. This feature is intended to be used for convenience, not security.
- Allowed users can now set a list of players' pseudos that are allowed to bypass the maintenance mode.
  > [!WARNING]
  > This feature is not a security measure. Players can easily bypass this restriction by modifying the request to the server. This feature is intended to be used for convenience, not security.

### Bug fixes and improvements

- The home clock should now display the correct server time instead of the UTC time.
- Code cleaning.
- Updated dependencies.

## How to upgrade

### First-time setup

Please follow [this guide](https://emlproject.com/docs) to install EML AdminTool for the first time.

### Upgrading from a previous version

1. Log in to EML AdminTool as administrator.
2. Click on the "Settings" tab.
3. Scroll down to the "Update" section.
4. Click on the "Update" button and wait for the update to complete.

Please note that EML AdminTool will not be available during the update process. We recommend that you perform the update during off-peak hours to minimize disruption to your users.
